session_id: Unique ID for each login session
login_channel: Channel used for login (helps simulate device variations)
failure_reason: If login failed, reason for failure
session_duration_sec: Duration of the session in seconds
is_first_time_login: Whether this is the first login
created_dt: When the session record was created
password_hash: Encrypted form of password/MPIN (for test/demo only)
mpin_hash: Hashed form of MPIN (never store raw values)

failure_reason: Wrong MPIN, Biometric Mismatch, OTP Expired
